coach_notes: To build a strong education career, focus on developing communication and child development skills, as they are foundational for engaging students and collaborating with parents. You can improve communication by practicing active listening in daily interactions and joining public speaking groups like Toastmasters. For child development, consider taking online courses on platforms like Coursera or volunteering at local childcare centers to gain hands-on experience.

jobs.title: ASC Math Tutor
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your resume includes mathematics, geometry, tutoring, and instruction skills directly relevant to an ASC Math Tutor role. Experience with lesson planning and assessments further supports this fit.
jobs.gaps: No specific gaps identified; ensure you highlight any prior tutoring experience with ASC or similar programs.

jobs.title: Math Tutor / Teacher
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong alignment with mathematics, tutoring, instruction, and lesson planning skills. Your background in teaching high school students and using assessments is directly applicable.
jobs.gaps: May need to emphasize experience with diverse student populations or specific teaching certifications if required.

jobs.title: Tutor, Math
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Direct match with mathematics tutoring, instruction, lesson planning, and assessment skills. Your experience with students and organization is highly relevant.
jobs.gaps: No significant gaps; ensure you can demonstrate experience with one-on-one or small group tutoring settings.

jobs.title: Part-Time Lecturer - Mathematics (Boston)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your mathematics and instruction skills are relevant, and experience with lesson planning and assessments supports a lecturer role. The Boston location may be accessible.
jobs.gaps: Part-time lecturer positions typically require a master's or PhD in mathematics or a related field. Your resume does not indicate advanced degree or college-level teaching experience.

jobs.title: Elementary Teacher (SY 2026-27)
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your skills in instruction, lesson planning, assessments, and organization are relevant to elementary teaching. Experience with Google Classroom and classroom management is a plus.
jobs.gaps: Elementary teaching requires state certification (e.g., elementary education license) and experience with younger students. Your resume focuses on high school and math tutoring, not elementary education.
